howItWorks.intro: This septic tank size calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Tank Size
rules.explanation: Bedroom-based calculation adjusted for water usage.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What size septic tank do I need?
faq.a: 1000 gallons minimum for up to 3 bedrooms, add 250 gallons per additional bedroom.

faq.q: How often should I pump my septic?
faq.a: Every 3-5 years for a family of 4, more often for larger households.
